g.text: Codata — the dual of algebraic data types

text.tspan: ana :: (s → F s) → s → Cofix F
cata :: (F a → a) → Fix F → a

div.p: Data (inductive): defined by constructors — how values are built. Guaranteed to be finite. Eliminated by case analysis.
Codata (coinductive): defined by destructors/observations — how values are taken apart. May be infinite. Introduced by corecursion.
